title: DURACELL Optimum AA Batteries (4 Pack) – Alkaline Batteries 1.5V – 200% More Power Boost Actives – Meets Demands Of Modern Devices – 100% Recyclable, 0% Plastic Packaging – MX1500
features: UPGRADE YOUR DEVICES: Duracell Optimum batteries with 200% more POWER BOOST Actives* give your power-hungry devices more power for longer**

FORMULATED WITH POWER BOOST ACTIVES: Duracell Optimum AA alkaline batteries contain Duracell’s patented POWER BOOST Actives, a unique blend of lithium & nickel which delivers lasting performance in your devices
OUR # 1 BEST PERFORMING BATTERY: Duracell’s Optimum AA alkaline battery is our best performing AA alkaline battery
SUSTAINABLE PACKAGING: The 0% plastic battery packaging is 100% recyclable
GUARANTEED FOR 12 YEARS IN STORAGE: Duracell guarantees each Optimum AA alkaline battery to last 12 years in storage, so you can be confident these batteries will be ready when you need them​***
*vs. Duracell Plus, Proprietary technology **vs. other Duracell batteries ***Commercial guarantee
description: Product Description Upgrade your devices with DURACELL Optimum AA batteries, with 200% more POWER BOOST Actives* for longer-lasting power**. Formulated with DURACELL’s patented POWER BOOST Actives, a unique blend of lithium & nickel, which delivers lasting performance in your devices ensuring lasting performance. They come in a sustainable packaging with 0% plastic and 100% recyclable materials. And, with a 12-year storage guarantee, you can be confident that these batteries will be ready whenever you need them. *vs. Duracell Plus. Proprietary technology, **vs. other Duracell batteries.​ ***Commercial guarantee Manufacturer Contact Information (UK) Duracell UK Ltd., 23 Sheen Road, Richmond, TW9 1BN, United Kingdom.
